title: Ennamo Pannura Lyrics Vaaliba Raja Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Ennamo pannura
Singer(s):Radhan, Rajan, Ramee
Movie: Vaaliba Rajan
Music: Radhan
Lyrics: Radhan

All right ..
all my crazy things started blowing my mind
all right baby.
comon common .. alright

oh yeah !! I got you lady
let me tell you now
my heart is blowing all the time n now

Ennamo pannura, yedhedho seyyura
enakkul nulayura, may be may be.
tholuvum theriyala, sonnaalum puriyala
ennaaala mudiyala baby baby

Pakkathil neeyum vandhaaye
ne sattennu yedho senjaaye
facebook-u penne unnaale
en status ippo nallaale.

Penne nee indri naanilla
enna sollura.
nenje ayyaiyyao dhinamum
enna mellura.

Penne nee sirikkum sirippil
sikki nikkura.
penne nee enathaan pakkayil
vikki thikkura.

If u if you come to me baby
I'll I'll keep you happy
acho acho dont you worry
ellaathukkum ayyaa ready

Unna pattha udaney
manasukulla pongudhey pongudhey.
en iravu kanniyaaga
vandhu kollura kollura .

Unna paakkaama ennaala
thoongathaan mudiyala
adiye nee ennathaan
pannenu ketka puriyala.

you are you are my ice cream ponnu
i-phone .. apple kannu
time nu kedachaa whatappu pannu
loveu-ula eppavum temple runnu.

Dhinam dhinam
thanimayila theruvula alanjen
nilavula hey unnoda mugam varanjen

Sara sara
mazhayila megamaa thirinjaen
sottu sottaa unakkulla vilundhaen.

Passiyum edukkala, thokkam varavilla
thaniyaa polamburen ennadi senja
Sirikkum sirippila
kannakuliyula enna thallura enna kollura

you are you are my ice cream ponnu
i-phone .. apple kannu
time nu kedachaa whatappu pannu
loveu-ula eppavum temple runnu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Ennamo Pannura'?

The song expresses the excitement and confusion of young love, capturing the playful emotions that come with it.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Vaaliba Raja'?

Vaaliba Raja is a comedy film that revolves around the life of a young man navigating through love and relationships, making the song a perfect fit for its theme.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features vocals by Radhan, Rajan, and Ramee, with music composed by Radhan himself.

When was 'Ennamo Pannura' released?

The song was released on July 1, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Ennamo Pannura', the characters express their youthful exuberance and the thrill of love through playful and catchy lyrics. The upbeat tempo and lively melody create an atmosphere of celebration and joy, making it a perfect anthem for parties and gatherings. The song encapsulates the essence of carefree moments and the excitement of romantic feelings. Overall, it evokes a sense of happiness and light-heartedness that resonates with listeners.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Ennamo Pannura from Vaaliba Raja is a vibrant and catchy track that perfectly captures the essence of youthful exuberance. With Radhan's dynamic vocals complemented by Rajan and Ramee, this song is sure to get you moving. Dive into the lively beats and playful lyrics that celebrate the thrill of love and life!
stanzaMeanings: All my crazy thoughts are overwhelming me, alright baby. Come on, come on, alright.
Oh yeah!! I got you, lady. Let me tell you now, my heart is racing all the time now.
I don't know what to do, something is happening inside me, maybe, maybe. I can't understand even if you tell me, I can't handle it, baby, baby.
You came next to me, did something, and now my Facebook status is good because of you, girl.
Girl, without you, I am nothing. My heart is always thinking about you.
Girl, your smile is captivating. Girl, you are the one who is close to me.
If you come to me, baby, I will keep you happy. Don't worry, I am ready for everything.
Seeing you makes my heart flutter. My nights come alive because of you.
I can't sleep without seeing you. I can't understand what you are doing to me.
You are my ice cream girl, my iPhone. If you get time, send me a WhatsApp, we will always play Temple Run together.
Alright, alright... yeah baby, come on, come on.
Every day, in the streets, I wait for you under the moonlight, hoping to see your face.
In the rain, I feel like I have found something special, I am lost in you.
I don't want anything, I am just complaining about being alone. Why do you make me smile and then leave me?
You are my ice cream girl, my iPhone. If you get time, send me a WhatsApp, we will always play Temple Run together.
Seeing you makes my heart flutter. My nights come alive because of you.
I can't sleep without seeing you. I can't understand what you are doing to me.
